brand-story-image.query: Designed for Modern Heirlooms Velmora was born from a simple belief: fine jewelry should feel personal, attainable, and made to last. We work with skilled artisans to create demi-fine pieces in 18k gold plating — designed for everyday wear and the moments worth remembering.
